<!-- Thanks for contributing to The Office! -->

**What this changes**
A short description.

**Why**
The problem it solves or the thing it adds.

**Surface(s) touched**
- [ ] Office canvas (`public/index.html`)
- [ ] Daemon / spine (`daemon.mjs`, `core/contract.mjs`)
- [ ] Store (`*-store.mjs`)
- [ ] Agent helper (`office-*.mjs`)
- [ ] Docs only

**Checklist**
- [ ] `npm run doctor` is happy and `npm run demo` still boots
- [ ] No new npm dependencies (or: justified in the description)
- [ ] No real data / personal paths / session ids committed; `data/`,
      `public/knowledge/`, `public/transcripts/` left as empty skeletons
- [ ] If I touched rendering, I attached a screenshot
- [ ] If I touched the bus, the change is additive (no renamed/removed event types)
